articles.title: The A&P who built a business while logging flight hours
articles.description: At 23, Philip Krzyszton owns a 1965 Mooney, flies cargo, operates a growing mobile aircraft maintenance company known as AircraftMD , and holds both his pilot and airframe and powerplant certificates. He did it all without taking on debt.
